_meta.method: Cross-referenced Sangha Zen Chile (sanghazen.cl), Maitreya Comunidad (maitreyazen.cl), zenchile.cl directory, Asociación Budista Zen Deshimaru dojo list (Kosen Sangha — Santiago, Valdivia, Pucón), Tricycle's profile of Sho Den Dōjō Zen de Santiago, and Buddhistdoor en Español's Chile directory. Each entry verified against the centre's own site or an official lineage organisation.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Medium-high (~70-75%) for organised Zen sanghas with a website. Coverage solid for Kosen Sangha (Santiago, Valdivia, Pucón, plus smaller groups in Coquimbo/La Serena, Quilpué/Viña del Mar). Limited Plum Village footprint; no standalone Plum Village Chile site located.
knownGaps: Plum Village Chile sangha visited Santiago in the 2023 Latin America tour but has no permanent standalone URL located in 2026
Smaller Kosen-Sangha groups in Coquimbo, La Serena, Quilpué, and Viña del Mar share the parent Kosen URL and lack standalone sites
No active Kwan Um, Sanbō Zen International, Ōbaku, or White Plum presence located as of 2026

places.name: Sho Den Dōjō Zen de Santiago
places.address: Martín Alonso Pinzón 5882, Las Condes, Santiago
places.notes: Opened August 2002; named 'Sho Den' (The Exact Transmission) by Master Kosen. Approx. 20 regular practitioners.

places.name: Maitreya Comunidad — Dōjō Urbano Santiago
places.notes: Urban Zen practice community in the Los Domínicos area; weekly zazen Tuesdays/Thursdays.

places.name: Sangha Zen — Zendo Tunquén
places.notes: Coastal residential zendo near Algarrobo/Casablanca, paired with an urban Santiago practice site.

places.name: Centro Zen Chile — zenchile.cl
places.notes: Santiago-based Zen practice community; site lists 'Quienes Somos' and weekly schedule.
